reviews.comment:
Es una parada obligada, pero sigue estando igual de deteriorada...los baños sucios, sin papel ni jabón...

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-see, but it's still just as run-down...the bathrooms are dirty, with no toilet paper or soap...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBdXZYTEd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Tiene alojamiento y venden de todo un poco. Muy visitada por turistas.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. They have accommodations and sell a bit of everything. Popular with tourists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMU5IMk9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene todo lo que necesitas...hablando de lo básico, antes de cruzar a Brasil

(Translated by Google)
It has everything you need...talking about the basics, before crossing into Brazil
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBdjZpVm9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
siempre que viajo al Brasil es parada obligada para cargar nafta y comprar algo.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel to Brazil, it's a mandatory stop to fill up with gas and buy something.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBLV9YQW9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
En temporada Alta demanda, 1 solo playero para todos los surtidores. Baños inmundos . Filas para cargar combustible,

(Translated by Google)
During peak season, there's only one attendant for all the pumps. The restrooms are filthy. There are long lines to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBLTh6T2lnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy molestos los cambiastas que invaden la estación y preguntan si tenés dinero,qué les importa? La estación debería impedir este tipo de cosas que pueden provocar problemas

(Translated by Google)
The money changers who crowd the station asking if you have money are really annoying. What's it to them? The station should prevent this kind of thing, as it can cause problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBMGZyZ0dREAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar poco seguro ya que ahi al volver de brasil de nuetras vacciones le robaron el celular a mi hijo con lo mas importantes recuerdos de nuetras vacaciones

(Translated by Google)
It's an unsafe place, because when we returned from our vacation in Brazil, my son's cell phone was stolen there, containing the most important memories of our vacation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBOW9mX25RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atención, 2 personas atendiendo sin apuros, lleno de autos, mucha cola y como si seria poco, uno de los playeros, se fue para adentro, a hablar con un encargado pareciera, de camisa blanca. 2 hs de espera

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, two people working at a snail's pace, packed with cars, a long queue, and to top it all off, one of the attendants went inside to talk to a manager, apparently wearing a white shirt. Two-hour wait
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBMnNUdDZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atención de los playeros(prepotentes). Despacho de combustible super lenta. Filas de autos por la frontera. Además con la excusa que no tienen sistema. Solo efectivo. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service from the gas station attendants (arrogant). Extremely slow fuel dispensing. Long lines of cars at the border crossing. And they used the excuse that their system was down. Cash only. A disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dDVTSmp3RRAB
